programme.sub-title: Pour ou contre le vendredi fou?

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Pour ou contre les emplois réservés aux personnes issues de groupes sous-représentés?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : François Lambert, Geneviève Pettersen, Toula Drimonis et Victor Henriquez.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Inflation : les villes devraient-elles limiter les hausses de taxes à 2%?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : François Lambert, Victor Henriquez, Dominic Vallières et notre débatteuse invitée Justine McIntyre.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: La présidente de l'Assemblée nationale devrait-elle laisser siéger les députés péquistes le temps de régler le dossier du serment au
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : Antonine Yaccarini, Yves Boisvert, Me Anne-France Goldwater et Me Nada Boumeftah.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Inflation : les gouvernements devraient-ils offrir une aide financière d'urgence aux plus pauvres?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : Me Nada Boumeftah, Victor Henriquez, Geneviève Pettersen et notre débatteuse invitée Valérie Hélène Gagnon.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Contrôle des armes à feu : le projet de loi C-21 va-t-il assez loin?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : François Lambert, Antonine Yaccarini, Me Nada Boumeftah et notre débatteuse invitée Heidi Rathjen de PolySeSouvient.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Pour ou contre une loi pour forcer les Québécois à réduire leur consommation d'électricité?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : Geneviève Pettersen, Me Nada Boumeftah, François Lambert et notre débatteur invité Patrick Bonin de GreenPeace Canada.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Santé des jeunes : est-ce réaliste de les faire bouger 1 heure par jour à l'école?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : Antonine Yaccarini, Geneviève Pettersen, Victor Henriquez et notre débatteuse invitée Catherine Harel Bourdon.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Le ministre Pierre Fitzgibbon devrait-il couper les ponts avec ses amis hommes d'affaires?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : Victor Henriquez, François Lambert, Déborah Cherenfant et notre débatteur invité Vincent Guzzo.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : Victor Henriquez, Me Nada Boumeftah, Yves Boisvert et notre débatteur invité André Durocher.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Hausse de l'espérance de vie et pénurie de main-d'œuvre : devrait-on retarder l'âge de la retraite à 70 ans?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : Geneviève Pettersen, Dominic Vallières, Déborah Cherenfant et notre débatteur invité Pierre-Yves McSween.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Devrait-on élargir la règle du zéro alcool à tous les conducteurs?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : François Lambert, Meeker Guerrier, Geneviève Pettersen et notre débatteur invité Simon Telles.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo

programme.sub-title: L'alcool aussi cancérigène que le tabac : devrait-on l'indiquer sur les bouteilles?

programme.title: The Derby Stallion
programme.desc: In this inspiring story, an alcoholic former horse trainer sees the gift of horsemanship in a young boy.

programme.title: Train to Busan
programme.desc: As an unidentified virus sweeps the country, Korean government declares martial law. Those on a train to Busan must fight for their own survival. Starring Gong Yoo and Ma Dong-seok. Subtitled.

programme.title: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: One black and one white woman in 1955 Montgomery, Alabama must decide what they are going to do in response to the famous bus boycott lead by Martin Luther King.

programme.title: The Shooting

programme.desc: When a tornado hits a nuclear power plant and damages the cooling system, manager Corrine Maguire (Sharon Lawrence) and her staff try to avert a total meltdown. Meanwhile, her son, Campbell (Daniel Costello), has gone missing during the twister. Corrine asks her friend, policeman Jake Hannah (Mark-Paul Gosselaar), to locate Campbell and take him to safety. With the plant needing fuel to power a manual cooling motor, Jake must also drive a tanker to the facility and prevent a complete disaster.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Handcrafted America - Cast Iron Skillets, Baskets, Axes: Host Jill Wagner travels the country on a quest to find talented craftsmen who still make incredible items by hand. In Madison, Wisconsin, Jill makes sparks fly with Alisa Toninato, making cast iron skillets in the shape of the 50 states. In Ashley Falls, Massachusetts, JoAnn Catsos is one of only two people in the country to earn a degree in basket making. Joann shows Jill her octofoil basket, a pattern she invented. Finally, in Fairview, Tennessee, Jill meets Anthony Martin, who uses pre-Revolutionary War tools and techniques from the 1600s to craft one of man's oldest tools.

programme.title: State Plate
programme.desc: State Plate - Pennsylvania: Entertainer Taylor Hicks tastes his way across Pennsylvania on a quest to assemble a plate of its most iconic foods. First stop, the mushroom capital of the world, where Taylor learns how to cultivate edible fungi. Then, it's off to the City of Brotherly Love to make classic Philly Cheesesteaks. Next, Taylor ventures to Amish country to learn how to prepare chow-chow and twist pretzel dough. Finally, he learns how to make a classic molasses-filled dessert that lives up to its name: shoofly pie. It's a plateful of Pennsylvania cuisine filled with legends and stories behind the state's historic foods.

programme.title: Legends of the Pony Express
programme.desc: Heroic Pony Express riders and station keepers face deadly terrain, hostile Native Americans, and dangerous outlaws to deliver vital mail across the untamed frontier. Their life-and-death adventures unite the country and become the stuff of legends.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild West Chronicles - Pinkerton Detectives Track a Killer: After a bank robbery, two Pinkerton detectives join forces to track the notorious Missouri Kid. programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild West Chronicles - The Many Faces of Charles Siringo: Unable to apprehend the train-robbing Smith Brothers, Sheriff Doc Shores calls the Pinkerton Detective Agency for assistance. The agency sends Charles Siringo, an undercover specialist known for his unorthodox methods of capturing criminals.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Into The Wild Frontier - Mason & Dixon: Trailblazing Surveyors: English astronomers Charles Mason and Jeremiah Dixon brave deadly terrain and hostile Native Americans to resolve a border dispute in Colonial America. With science and courage, they survey their famous Mason-Dixon Line with pinpoint accuracy.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown - Lines in the Sand: The thirteen remaining cowboys face their first immunity challenge that tests their individual skills. The contestants race to score the fastest time in barrel racing and calf roping. While most cowboys impress Trace and the judges, only one will be safe from the next elimination. For the team challenge, the cowboys take on a group of untrained horses that they have to break, saddle, and ride. In the end, it all comes down to strategy, and the team that thinks ahead takes the win. After a few choice words, teammates lock horns, determined to out-cowboy the other. When an unexpected cowboy heads home, the rest of the contestants realize every move they make counts in this competition.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way

Bubba continues to shadow his father-in-law, making his first business pitch to a potential client. He begins to realize a life in Mississippi could prove to be very lucrative, but he isn't ready to hang up his spurs just yet. Misty convinces Cody to let her have his ranch horse for her new cattle business, requiring Cody and Booger to train a replacement colt for Cody. programme.desc: Moody was born “Matthew” in Syracuse, NY, into a rambunctious household with six siblings. (They're Irish...somebody had to get a nickname.) He began doing comedy in 1992 and was soon hired by Syracuse's top morning radio show to cover sports and write jokes, his first loves. After six years of working the road, Moody moved to New York City. This millennium has been good to Moody: he's also been featured on Last Comic Standing, Star Search (the 2003 reboot), and America's Got Talent. He's a regular at the best clubs in the land (including the world famous Comedy Cellar) and can be heard on SiriusXM. Moody's material is described as original but universal, and smart without being trite. Couple that with a disarming stage presence & in-the-moment chops, you'll see why he's earned the admiration of his peers for his ability to “go up cold” and turn any setting into a hot room. From corporate outings to pubs, this versatile performer will brighten any event.

programme.title: Alex Velluto
programme.desc: Alex Velluto is a stand-up comedian and Diet Coke drinker from Salt Lake City, Utah. He has performed at comedy festivals all over the country including the Boston Comedy Festival, Big Sky Comedy Festival, and the Seattle International Comedy Competition. He was named “Best of Fest” at the Golden Spike Comedy Festival and is the winner of the Finger Lakes Comedy Festival in Ithaca, NY. In 2016, Alex was voted “Best Comedian” by City Weekly Magazine. His debut comedy special “Alex Velluto: Spurious” is currently streaming on Amazon.com.

programme.title: Leland Klassen
programme.desc: Raised on a farm in the heart of Canada, Leland quickly learned that shoveling manure and weeding potatoes, although lucrative, wasnít his passion in life. So with absolutely no clear direction or vision for his future, he did what everyone does when they find themselves in that position - he went to University. He wisely chose his classes based on whichever cute girl happened to catch his attention and after several short years of last minute cramming and late assignments, Leland graduated from the University of Saskatchewan with a degree in Anthropology. As you might have guessed, Lelandís university education opened many doors for him in the years to come, but for some reason he was dissatisfied working for a courier as a night shift stock boy. By this time married and with his first child soon on the way, the most responsible and obvious choice was, of course, to pursue a career in the entertainment industry. Starting off at amateur nights and seedy bars Leland decided right from the beginning that he would remain clean despite what everyone else was doing and as a result over the last 16 years Leland has become recognized as Canadaís premier clean comedian. With his unique intelligence and wit, Leland has carved out quite a niche for himself in the world of entertainment. Using his farm boy charm and handsome (although somewhat inbred) Mennonite good looks, Lelandís clever observations and rich life experiences are brought to life in a one-of-a-kind show. LELANDíS CREDITS: Halifax Comedy Fest 2014, Just for Laughs in Montreal, 1999, 2001, 2004 and 2014, Host of Popcorn TV, Featured on Thou Shalt Laugh 5, Host of Comedy Tournament, Co-Host GMA Canada 2009, 2012 and 2013, Promise Keepers Canada, Episode of the US syndicated comedy series ìBananasî, Two of his own television seriesí on the West Coast, as well as Appeared on numerous other programs across the United States and Canada, such as Comedy Network, CBC Television, YTV, Star TV, Global and Discovery Kids.

programme.title: Johnny Beehner
programme.desc: Johnny Beehner puts on a funny show. He's got everything you want from a comic: He's silly, he's likeable, and he's fun. With a background in improvisational theater including training at Chicago's prestigious Second City, as well as the Upright Citizens Brigade in Los Angeles, Johnny brings a unique style to the stage. Beehner made his network television debut in January of 2015 as one of the last comedians to appear on the Late Show with David Letterman. He has made numerous appearances on FOX "Laughs" television show, and regularly appears on the nationally syndicated Bob & Tom Show. His comedy can be heard regularly on XM/ Sirius Satellite radio. Other notable and accomplishments of Johnny's include winning First place in Comcast's 2014 season of "Trial By Laughter," placing third in the 2014 “Laughing Skull Comedy Festival” of Atlanta, and making it to the finals in the 2012 “Great American Comedy Festival”. He was named one of Ricky Gervais' Top 5 picks in the "Just Sayin” stand up contest. Johnny was recently named one of 2015's Top10, "Hot Comics to Watch" by his wife. She says that he would have a shot at the #1 spot if he would “work just a little bit harder”. He's a married man, a new dad, and his current life goal is to win just one argument with his beautiful wife.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Best of
programme.desc: From hailstorms to hurricanes and tornadoes, the Storm Hunters revisit their craziest chases and share some of the most amazing moments in extreme weather events.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | 1000 Year Storm
programme.desc: A slow moving disaster engulfs a city under water. The Stormhunters find themselves knee deep in flood waters as historic amounts of rainfall threatens to wash them away.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Arctic Winter
programme.desc: George links up with two experienced polar adventurers to explore the frigid Canadian arctic in the depths of winter. The team first uses skis to cross the fractured sea ice of Frobisher Bay, then dog teams to head north through the spectacular Auyuittuq Mountains.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Highway to Hail
programme.desc: George and three side-kicks head straight into the “Bearcage”, looking to get beat up by the biggest, baddest hailstones that Texas and Oklahoma can throw at them. They find it – and their stormchasing vehicles don't look too pretty after coming through these massive storms.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Under Pressure
programme.desc: It's dark, it's cold, there is no air to breath and everything is under extreme pressure. George begins his exploration of the deep with a well-preserved shipwreck in the st.lawrence River, then heads west to dive with undersea explorers Chris Harvey-Clark and Phil Nuyyton, and investigate the newly discovered “Black Smoker” deepsea vents. The show climaxes in Curacao, where we dive to 1000 feet aboard Nuyyton's newest submersible.

programme.title: Angry Planet | 2009 Hurricane
programme.desc: The “Angry Planet” team will be tracking storms through the 2009 Hurricane season, and plan to film george as he heads into a big one.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Tornadoes
programme.desc: Ground Zero for host/adventurer George Kourounis‚ stormchasing is Oklahoma City, capital of North America's ´Tornado Alley´. George tracks a building storm that threatens that tough mid-western city, chases a hail storm, fights to get in the middle of a vicious dust-devil and the funky roadside Americana of the American Midwest.

programme.title: Angry Planet | African Hellhole
programme.desc: The Angry Planet team heads to Africa to climb the steep and very active Nyiragongo Volcano in the Congo that erupted in 2002, sending 125,000 people fleeing for their lives. Host/adventurer George Kourounis explores the bubbling lake of molten lava and investigates the risk the dangerous volcano poses to both the people of city of Goma and the Mountain Gorillas who live on the nearby jungle slopes.

programme.title: Angry Planet | The Winds of Autumn
programme.desc: The autumn of 2006 brings hurricanes to the North Atlantic and hot dry winds fan forest fires across Northern Ontario. Host/adventurer George Kourounis has traveled to some awesome hurricanes, including Rita and Katrina, with his pal Mark Robinson. This year they stormchase in Newfoundland, site of the hurricane that pulled Mark out of a life-threatening depression.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Volcanic Wedding
programme.desc: Host George Kourounis has braved many terrifying phenomena – but none as frightening as the one he takes on in this episode: marriage! To make sure his new bride is on the same adventurous page with him, he proposes to get married on the lip of an exploding volcano, on the South Pacific island of Tanna, in Vanuatu. Before the native preacher, dressed in grass skirt and kustom garb, gets to perform the smoky vows, George descends into the erupting volcano to bring out red hot samples of the lava it is producing.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Slip and Slide

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby Lullaby takes your baby on a soothing journey with classical lullabies by Bach, Brahms and Mozart. Enjoy relaxing ocean waves, sweet puppet shows and tranquil images. From fun time to rest time, Baby Lullaby is the perfect way to spend special time with your baby.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: My First Signs: See and Sign With Baby
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby Mozart is an introduction to Mozart's beautiful music, which has been proven to have positive affects on people of all ages, especially babies. Images of brightly colored toys and known objects aid in the audio presentation of child-friendly arrangements and sound effects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Moves: Get Up and Go
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Sounds: Discoveries for Little Ears
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake travels to magical Holidayland with Honey Pie Pony, searching for the perfect presents to give her friends. It all ends well, though, when Strawberry's friends remind her that the best gift of all is the gift of friendship.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the first day of spring in Strawberryland, at least it's supposed to be, but with the cold winds blowing and frost on the ground it looks as though spring isn't going to come this year. So Strawberry Shortcake and her two friends, Orange Blossom and Ginger Snap, go in search of spring. Spring is a young girl who doesn't want to do her job until Strawberry convinces her that everyone needs Spring's help and shows her that working together can make any job fun!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.desc: Strawberry and the girls excitedly plan to put on a “Story Time On Stage” musical play for the Berrykin kids: “Berryella and Prince Berry Charming,” directed and choreographed by Plum, with musical direction by Cherry. Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother. Orange is the stage manager, assisted by stagehands Berrykin Ed and Berrykin Earl. They've barely begun when they face their first problem: the Berrykin who was supposed to play Prince Charming has broken his toe and must bow out of the production!

programme.title: Blippi's Wonderful World Tour
programme.desc: Dance, sing, and learn with Blippi like you've never seen him before and special guest Meekah. Shout out your favorite vehicles, shake out all the wiggles, and OJ Twist your way through this brand-new musical party!

programme.title: Blippi's Big Dino Adventure
programme.desc: Get ready for a fun-filled journey as they search for hidden dinosaur eggs, explore exciting dino habitats, and learn all about different dinosaur species. Along the way, they'll discover fascinating facts, solve puzzles, and have plenty of hands-on fun!

programme.title: On the Road
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone. Strawberry and her friends give the Berrykins a crash course in city-sitting.

programme.title: A Boy and His Dogs
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City. What the Berrykins mistook for a monster was really the bunch of cute pups Huck has been trying to get adopted. While Huck's van is being repaired, Strawberry invites Huck and his seven pups to spend the night in the new bedroom above the marketplace, while she bunks in her old bedroom above the café. The next morning, Strawberry discovers that the playful pups have given her bedroom a total makeover –the wrong kind. An embarrassed Huck insists on staying until he can repair the damage.

programme.title: HappyKids
programme.desc: HappyKids

programme.title: Must see TV!
programme.desc: There's just one problem with his plan: sitting around and not moving would make his body feel terrible. At school Sid and his friends learn that exercising is a really fun way to stay healthy! And it makes your body feel great!

programme.title: Blippi's Winter Olympics 2022
programme.desc: The Olympics are back! Blippi and Meekah want to learn all about winter sports.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble 2
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble 2 - Zap Attack 2: Gamers test their electrifying memory skills in this puzzle! To play this level search "Kidaverse" on Roblox.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble 2
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble 2 - Jungle Jump 2: Gamers race through the jungle in this tropical obby! To play this level search "Kidaverse" on Roblox.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble 2
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble 2 - Garden Gauntlet 2: Gamers try not to get lost in this garden hedge maze! To play this level search "Kidaverse" on Roblox.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers
programme.desc: Rainbow Rangers - Calling Fowl / Treehouse Trouble: The Rangers discover Preston Praxton is feeding ducks to keep them off his golf course and it's making them sick. / Preston is harvesting trees so Patty can build her massive dream treehouse, and is in turn destroying the forest.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers
programme.desc: Rainbow Rangers - Car Wash / Preston's Shipwreck: Preston's washing his car in his orchard and the runoff from the chemicals in the soap is polluting the riverbed and harming animals. / Preston's determination to find treasure in an old pirate shipwreck threatens an inter-marine-species Utopian paradise.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Superhero Kindergarten - Bessie We Hardly Knew Ye: Vik's quest to find Bessie the lake monster teaches everyone that just because you can't see something doesn't mean it isn't real.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Superhero Kindergarten - The Magic Ring: A trip to meet Mr. Arnold's friends Penn and Teller leads to a magical mystery that only the Super K's can solve: what happened to Houdini's Ring?

programme.title: Angry Birds
programme.desc: Angry Birds - Piggies From The Deep & More: Fun adventure episodes from Angry Birds, Piggy Tales and Stella! In this episode watch "Piggies From The Deep", "Oh Gnome!" and more!

programme.title: Angry Birds
programme.desc: Angry Birds - Chucked Out, Bomb's Awake & More: Fun adventure episodes from Angry Birds, Piggy Tales and Stella! In this episode watch "Chucked Out", "Bomb's Awake" and more!

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: Street Sharks - To Shark or Not to Shark: Dr. Piranoid turns the Sharks human again as part of a plot to make the transformation permanent.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: Street Sharks - Eco Shark: Investigating whale attacks, the Sharks and Moby Lick uncover Malcolm Medusa III's secret polluted sanctuary, hidden by holograms.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Roadsterball / Blond is Back!: Klaus' longtime nemesis, Niccolo Tessio, challenges the Paq to a game of Roadsterball. Team leader Klaus only chooses the fastest and strongest of the Paq to help, but it doesn't go the way he planned. Klaus must figure out a way to utilize all of the strengths of the Paq members or they'll loose the game. / Shaq has a big surprise for Fleming. He's invited the actor who played James Blond, Ian Connery, to come visit. Ian always wished they could have gone on a real mission together and Fleming feels the same way.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Close Encounters of the Bad Kind / Gold Fever!: Dawkins and Himari are driving back to the garage at night and he is pointing out different stars to her and she is bored. Dawkins sees a strange star that he's never seen before. Then, the star moves across the sky and crashes in the distance. An alien captures them, intending to take them back to his planet as spare parts and they must find a way to escape before the ship takes off. / Boone tells The Paq about the story of The Lost Scotchman's Mine, a legendary treasure buried deep in the hills or Orlanta. Is it a myth or real? Fleming, Gronk, and Himari all decide to find out.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - The Big Hike / Back to the Jurassic: Nine kids from the Boys & Girls Club go on a nature hike with Boone, Fleming, and Gronk. Gronk tries to follow Shaq's rule of staying on the trail, but one of his adventurous kids convinces him to go explore. When they get lost, they have to find their way back to the trail before nightfall. / Dawkins invites Biggie D, Fleming, and Himari to a viewing of a rare daylight lunar eclipse out in the wilderness. When a mysterious fog appears and transports them back to the Jurassic Era, the Paq must find their way back a fast as possible. What they didn't plan on was an extra passenger back to the present: a baby T-Rex!

programme.title: The Final Game
programme.desc: With the fate of the dragon horns hanging in the balance, the Ninja must rally to defend them from those who seek their power.

programme.title: Elements of Betrayal
programme.desc: The Ninja clash with the notorious Forbidden Five in a fierce showdown, but the arrival of unexpected allies shifts the momentum.

programme.title: Prophecy Of The Green Ninja, Greatest Battles
programme.desc: So the final puzzle forces ninja to question the true meaning of the Green Ninja Prophecy. Solving the puzzles releases a new peril for the Ninja to face. Will memories of their greatest victories be enough to defeat it?

programme.title: The Power and the Peril!
programme.desc: Rock star mathematician Ian Malcolm returns to Isla Nublar and helps Claire, Owen and Hudson deal with strange power surges all over Jurassic World.

programme.title: Fistful of Doppelgangers
programme.desc: The Candy Realm is under siege, and the dream chasers are tasked with saving its sugary inhabitants. As they orchestrate a mass evacuation, Mateo and Astrid sneak into the Midnight Raven.

programme.title: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: The elusive Eye of Confusion has been located, but the dream chasers are not alone in their pursuit. With the Never Witch's doppelgangers on their heels, the team embarks on a frantic treasure hunt.

programme.title: Mission Inplausible
programme.desc: As the Eye of Confusion's power threatens to unravel reality, Logan and Astrid are forced to confront their deepest fears in the Dream Forge.

programme.title: Music “Battle of the Stars”
programme.desc: Nova pulls off a series of pranks, leaving her friends scrambling and laughing. However, things take a dark turn when one of her pranks goes awry and sends the group into a terrifying situation.

programme.title: The Royal Blacksmiths
programme.desc: The four ninja go undercover as a dance troupe and enter a talent contest in their quest to win “The Blade Cup” where one of the fang blades is hidden.

programme.title: Marvel Superheroes
programme.desc: Loki arrives at Avengers Tower declaring he wants to be an Avenger. Our heroes are skeptical, but Iron Man decides to make Loki an ”Avenger In Training”. It's a great plan until Thanos arrives on Earth looking for Loki

programme.title: The Book Of Total Badness
programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: Gorilla's Gone Wild
programme.desc: Cragger angers the Gorilla tribe and they march to the Crocodile Swamp to teach him a lesson. But the Gorilla Mechs are not fit for the swampy water and the Lions and Eagles must come to the rescue. The only problem is that the Lions don't like water ... at all!

programme.title: The Haunted and the Hunted!
programme.desc: Something mysterious lurking the jungle wrecks a construction site, and Hudson is convinced a ghost is responsible - but it might be something even more surprising.

programme.title: The Snowball Effect
programme.desc: Laval and Li'Ella's relationship grows as he gives her a tour of the Lion City. But distracted, he misses a key battle against the Hunters. Tormak joins the fight and saves the day. But the Lion King Lagravis is captured and brought to the Ice Fort. Who will lead the Lions now?!?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh
programme.desc: With freedom on the line, Jaden and Chazz continue their duel out of school and personal pride.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh
programme.desc: When Jaden and the gang get trapped in an ancient world, Jaden must win a duel or be buried alive with the rest of his friends.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh
programme.desc: Jaden continues to battle in the duel of his life to save his friends and the chance to make it back to his world.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh
programme.desc: Yugi rescues Kaiba, but they are still stuck in the game the only exit is past the five-headed Dragon, but in the difficult duel, Joey, Mokuba and Mai lose all their life points Yugi and Kaiba must put aside their animosity to face the dragon.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: A Pokémon breeding contest gives our heroes a chance to compete, greet an old friend, and defeat Team Rocket once again!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: When Ash comes down with a serious stomachache far from any hospital, a local healer and his Shuckle companions are on task to set him right!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: A run-in with his longtime rival Gary leaves Ash in a bad mood. But when Team Rocket's latest weapon starts terrorizing the local Pokémon Center, Ash might have to turn to him for help!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: After our heroes meet a mountain patrol and their Ledian partners, they'll have to help protect the mountain from a destructive Team Rocket attack!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: With his new Gym badge in hand, Ash is asked to appear on a local radio station. But while he's acting out a radio drama with some "professional actors," the scripted danger becomes all too lifelike!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: A Bug Pokémon Catching Contest turns into a hive of activity when Ash goes up against his rival Casey—and it isn't long before the Team Rocket villains swarm the scene, intent on catching a few things for themselves…

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: On the way to Ecruteak City, our heroes are trapped on the wrong side of a river. To get across, they first have to find a Sudowoodo...which, even for an expert, is no easy feat!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: When an ex-student of Professor Oak's discovers some restored Omanyte and Omastar in the wild, our heroes are called into action to save these prehistoric Pokémon from harsh times with Team Rocket!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: The Pidgey Express courier service is in need of our heroes' helping hands, especially when Team Rocket wants to have the delivery Pidgey signed, sealed, and delivered to the Boss!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Caught in a sudden downpour, our heroes find a castle clinic that uses Pokémon healers to help patients. But when Brock and the doctor end up trapped in the castle's labyrinth, a helping hand is needed to get them out!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: After meeting the elderly owner of a Pokémon dojo, Ash is called upon to replace the man's granddaughter as the chosen heir! But when a vicious challenger approaches, can Ash help defend the dojo from destruction?

programme.desc: Chikorita, Cyndaquil, and Totodile find themselves separated from the group and stuck in a ravine! When Meowth finds himself stuck too, an unlikely partnership forms!

programme.title: Awesome Adventures!
programme.desc: Travel the world, zipline through jungles, hike mountain tops and find treasure in the tropics. Sleeping in the jungle with rhinos, building an African house, and going on a wildlife safari.

programme.title: Awesome Adventures!
programme.desc: Travel the world, zipline through jungles, hike mountain tops and find treasure in the tropics. The Ninja Family will need all their skills on a deserted island with no way off.

programme.title: Ninja Challenge
programme.desc: The Ninja Kidz go head-to-head in fun physical competitions, gymnastic events and games. The Ninja Fam takes on Abu Dhabi's most extreme parks including a mega waterpark and Ferrari World.

programme.title: Ninja Challenge
programme.desc: The Ninja Kidz go head-to-head in fun physical competitions, gymnastic events and games. Bryton sneaks into the Ninja Kidz Action Park on an undercover mission to spy on the best employees!

programme.title: Payton
programme.desc: Payton Delu does it all—teen life, gymnastics routines, and Ninja challenges. Payton and Paxton's 15th birthday is an epic adventure with unbelievable surprises and excitement.

programme.title: Payton
programme.desc: Payton Delu does it all—teen life, gymnastics routines, and Ninja challenges. Payton attends her first dance recital in over ten years and has a blast.

programme.title: Ninja Challenge

programme.title: Ninja Universe
programme.desc: Boys vs. Girls, Princess vs. Superheroes in an epic gymnastics challenge.

programme.title: Urban Tails
programme.desc: The Eurasian BEAVER is a keystone species. / DJ RED the robin redbreast might just be the world's favourite bird. / HUMPDY is a majestic HUMPBACK WHALE. / A small and quick diving bird, LADY KING, the electric blue kingfisher perches high above the slow-moving waters of rivers and streams. / BIG SONNY the mammoth Ocean Sunfish is super unique in appearance and style. / WILLY-T teaches us in his song, “I'm the white-tailed Eagle”, that these eagles where once a species of concern- they were almost extinct, but now they are making a comeback!

programme.title: Urban Tails
programme.desc: MISS MABEL, the Eurasian MAGPIE, is one of the world's most intelligent creatures, she can even recognize herself in the mirror! / Don't get it twisted, DR NEWTON ain't no lizard he is a sleek stylish SMOOTH NEWT who likes the quiet life of slow-moving waters. / MC JACKY T is a rare NATTERJACK TOAD with a big voice! / HYPA HYENA, the cool spotted hyena from sub-saharan Africa, invites us to laugh along with her as we learn cool hyena facts. / The size of a house cat, LIL' P is a funky phat PINE MARTEN on the rise! On her track “The Pine Rhyme” she lets us know that she adores feasting on fruit, insects, small animals too, BUT her favourite food are bilberries, whose blue colouring turns her poop blue!!! / SIR FEATHAZ & LADY FEATHAZ are noisy and gregarious COMMON STARLINGS. They show us that they are very sociable birds, experts at mimicry and of course experts at mesmerizing aerial displays.

programme.title: Larva
programme.desc: Yellow helps Red to escape only to discover the rollercoaster of life and they have a whale of a time. / Red takes control of a flying fish to escape the seagulls and our Larva end up in a new city. / Out on the lonely, cold streets of New York City, Red and Yellow suffer from starvation. When they are about to collapse from hunger something came into their sight! A Donut! Now the competition starts between Red and Yellow to take over the donut! / While shivering in the middle of the freezing streets of NY, Red, Yellow and Brown luckily find a lit-up match. Despite their desperate effort to keep the flare from dying out, the fire keeps on getting smaller. Could they save their flare? / It's freezing cold! Red and Yellow suffer from a severe blizzard. Luckily, they find a warm, comfortable box! As they were about to rest, they find a hole in the box that just keeps on getting bigger and bigger.

programme.title: Larva
programme.desc: One disaster after another, now it's a typhoon! Then starts the bugs' pitiful chase for a little cocktail weenie in the midst of the disaster. Who will be the lucky winner? / It's a very hot day, so hot that it is like a burning oven. In such deadly heat, Red and Yellow are desperate to put the water drops seeping out of a fireplug into their mouths. But they keep on missing it by the oddest timing. / After their horrible first encounter with the sourness of lemon, Red and Yellow decide to kindly share their pain with their fellow bugs. Come and get your lemon, boys / Yellow accidentally swallows his gum and falls asleep in disappointment. The next day Red wakes up to find himself surrounded by bubble full of farts! / As the shadow, the only protection against the scorching heat, becomes smaller and smaller, Red and Yellow spot a larger shadow from afar. Come ye who seek refuge, sweat, sweat, and sweat! / Red and Yellow's magnificent Ice Show on the frozen water fountain! Bam! Red falls onto the ice and it starts cracking! Could Red and Yellow survive from this terrible ice cracks?

Can they gather the right sizes and get the ingredients to the kitchen for the Cooking Countdown? / The Bumble Nums are making Boogie Down Baba Ganoush and need four boogieing eggplants! So, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble break out their best dance moves to get the eggplants moving and help catch them! But, how can they get the ingredient to the kitchen for the Cooking Countdown? They need to wrangle six speedy cheese wheels from the barn. Will they make it in time to make their mouthwatering meal?

programme.title: Wes Montgomery
programme.desc: This selection of unforgettable performances by some of the most iconic and influential jazz guitarists in history showcases these legends' unique essence. Revel in Wes Montgomery's virtuosity as he performs the captivating “Nica's Dream” in Holland in 1965, and delight in the expressive beauty of his rendition of “Here's That Rainy Day”, recorded in London in that same year. Experience the timeless appeal of Joe Pass's “You Stepped Out of a Dream” and “You Turned The Tables on Me”, recorded live in Hanover in 1975. The interplay between Jim Hall and Atilla Zoller borders on the impossible as they perform “Extensions” in Hanover in 1973. Enjoy Jim Hall's lyrical solo performance of “I'm Getting Sentimental Over You” from 1964. Witness Sonny Sharrock's avant-garde fusion of jazz and rock in an exhilarating performance of “Peanut", recorded live in France in 1970. Sharrock is joined by flutist Herbie Mann in a soulful performance of “Memphis Underground” from 1969. Immerse yourself in the magic of jazz guitar!

programme.title: Herbie Mann, Marc Cohen, Romero Lubambo & Paul Socolow
programme.desc: 'Münchner Klaviersommer' was an annual concerts series that took place from 1981 to 1998 in Munich, Germany. Although the festival's name suggests a strong focus on piano music, it featured countless famous musicians from jazz and classical music – not just pianists. The concerts were usually held in July at The Gasteig, home of the Munich Philharmonic. In 1990, American flautist Herbert Jay Solomon, better known by his stage name Herbie Mann, was one of the artists appearing here. Together with Marc Cohen on piano, Romero Lubambo on guitar, Paul Socolow on bass, and both Ricky Sebastian and Cyro Baptista on percussion, Herbie Mann performs his infectious take on Brazilian-inspired music in this concert titled 'Jasil Brazz'.

programme.title: Jimmy Smith
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Charles Bradley
programme.desc: On April 26, 2012, the world-famous vocalist Charles Bradley and his Extraordinaires grace the stage of the Cigale in Paris. Success did not come easily for the American. Before Bradley (1948-2017) even considered a career as a singer, he tried to make ends meet with countless odd jobs. Only in 1996 he finally followed in the footsteps of his great idol, soul icon James Brown. Brown and Bradley shared the talent to bring an audience to ecstasy. With his mix of funk, soul, and R&B, Bradley has developed a sound of his own, in which a keen ear might find a few traces of James Brown.

programme.title: George Benson & Earl Klugh
programme.sub-title: George Benson and Earl Klugh - North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1987, prominent guitarist George Benson brought his band to kick off day three of the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague. Joining him to play songs from their joint album "Collaborations" was Grammy award–winning acoustic guitarist Earl Klugh.

programme.title: Christian McBride
programme.desc: On July 20, 2018, double bassist Christian McBride presented his band ‘New Jawn' at the Malta Jazz Festival. A five-time Grammy winner, McBride is one of the most requested, most recorded, and most respected figures in the music world today. Hailing from Philadelphia, this music luminary combines jazz, R&B, pop/rock, hip hop/neo-soul, and classical. Gracing the Malta Jazz stage with him are Nasheet Waits (drums), Marcus Strickland (tenor sax), and Josh Evans (trumpet).

programme.title: Chucho Valdés, Concha Buika, Rodney Barreto & Dreiser Durruthy Bombale
programme.desc: ‘Jazz a Vienne' is one of the world's most prestigious jazz festivals. Ever since 1981 it has attracted leading jazz artists, with many of them playing return engagements. Unsurprisingly, the festival's 2013 edition did not fall short of expectations: the lineup was filled with the biggest names in music. Among them were Chucho Valdes and his Afro-Cuban Messengers, the prime example of Latin-inspired jazz music. Together with vocalists Concha Buika and Dreiser Durruthy Bombale, Rodney Barreto on drums, Gaston Joya on double bass, Yaroldy Abreu Robles on congas, and Reinaldo Melian Alvarez on trumpet, the legendary pianist brings the streets of Havana to the festival's stage.

programme.title: Ballet of the Mariinsky Theatre
programme.desc: 'La Bayadère' is a three-act ballet by the French choreographer Marius Petipa. Set in 19th-century India, 'La Bayadère' tells the sad love story of the noble warrior Solor and his Nikia, a temple dancer or 'bayadère', who is poisoned by her rival, Gamzatti. The ballet features one of the most celebrated scenes of classical ballet, namely 'The Kingdom of the Shades'. In this iconic scene, Solor dreams, under the influence of opium, of reuniting with his beloved Nikia. This production of the ballet features the revised choreography by Vladimir Ponomarev and Vakhtang Chabukiani (1941), and includes dances by Konstantin Sergeyev and Nikolai Zubkovsky. The ballet's music, composed by Ludwig Minkus, is performed by the Mariinsky Orchestra under the direction of Boris Gruzin. Among the performers are Viktoria Tereshkina, Anastasia Matvienko, Vladimir Shklyarov, and Vladimir Ponomarev. This performance was recorded at the Mariinsky Theatre in St. Petersburg, Russia, in July 2014.

programme.title: Marina De Liso, Roberto Loreggian & Nicola Dal Maso
programme.sub-title: Vocal works by Monteverdi, Frescobaldi a. o.
programme.desc: The six-concert series “Io suono italiano” is dedicated to music of Italian composers and performed by Italian musicians on Italian instruments. The concert programs cover four centuries of music: from Girolamo Frescobaldi and Antonio Vivaldi to more contemporary music by Ennio Morricone and Azio Corghi. Each program presents more familiar pieces alongside lesser-known compositions. These performances were filmed at the atmospheric Teatro Sociale in Rovigo, Italy, in January 2021. In this program, Marina De Liso (soprano), Roberto Loreggian (harpsichord), and Nicola Dal Maso (violone) present vocal Baroque music. On the program are Benedetto Ferrari's Amanti io vi so dire, Barbara Strozzi's Lamento, Tradimento, and Che si può fare, Giovanni Felice Sances's Usurpator tiranno, Girolamo Frescobaldi's Partite sopra il Passacagli, and Se l'aura spira, Claudio Monteverdi's Ohimè ch'io cado, and Si dolce è il tormento.

programme.title: Conrad van Alphen
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Glass Marcano, Orchestre Symphonique Région Centre-Val de Loire/Tours & Stéphanie-Marie Degand
programme.sub-title: Beethoven Violin Concerto & Bizet Symphony in C
programme.desc: Young Venezuelan conductor Glass Marcano is a rising star. Having played in various local youth and symphony orchestras as a violinist, her first experience conducting an ensemble followed in 2012. In September 2020, she won the Orchestra Prize at La Maestra Competition – the first orchestra direction contest for women – held in Paris. In this concert, recorded at Opéra de Tours in February 2021, Marcano leads the Orchestre Symphonique Région Centre-Val de Loire/Tours in performances of two Romantic masterpieces. The program opens with Ludwig van Beethoven's Violin Concerto in D major, Op. 61, featuring Stéphanie-Marie Degand as the soloist. This piece is one of the most important works in its genre. The program concludes with Georges Bizet's 1855 Symphony in C major, written when the composer was only 17 years old.

programme.title: Nikolay Lugansky
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: David Grimal & Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances play Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart's Violin Concerto No. 4 in D major, K. 218. Leading violinist Grimal features as the soloist. With the exception of the first violin concerto, Mozart composed his other four violin concertos in 1775 at a time when he was concertmaster at the Salzburg court. Among his five concertos, Violin Concerto No. 4 is one of the best-known. This performance was recorded at Cité de la Musique, France, in 2014.

programme.title: Eliane Reyes
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Matthias Goerne, Vilde Frang, Nicolas Altstaedt & Stathis Karapanos
programme.sub-title: J. S. Bach - Arias, solos, and duets
programme.desc: Baritone Matthias Goerne teams up with violinist Vilde Frang, cellist Nicolas Altstaedt, flutist Stathis Karapanos, and harpsichordist Michaela Hasselt in this program dedicated to the music of J. S. Bach. They perform baritone arias from Bach's most beautiful cantatas, as well as solo pieces and duets. On the program are Sonata No. 3 in C major for violin solo, BWV 1005 arias ‘Hier, in meines Vaters Stätte', BWV 32 and ‘Die Welt mit allen Königreichen', BWV 59 Suite No. 5 in C minor for cello solo, BWV 1011 ‘Wenn Trost und Hülf ermangeln muß', BWV 117 ‘Ja, ja, ich halte Jesum fest', BWV 157 Invention No. 7 in E minor, BWV 778 Invention in A major, BWV 783 and ‘Welt ade, ich bin dein müde', BWV 158. This performance was recorded at St. Mary's Church in Wittenberg, Germany.

programme.desc: Symphonic mastery meets cinematic magic in the most monumental films of all time.
